findings.title: Slack webhook URL in README
findings.description: A Slack incoming-webhook URL is present in the README; it posts to a public #announcements channel

findings.title: S3 bucket acme-docs is public
findings.description: Bucket acme-docs is world-readable; it holds only the published API reference documentation

findings.title: CVE in a dev dependency
findings.description: a linter used only in CI has CVE-2023-0002; not present in any shipped artifact

findings.title: Framework version disclosed
findings.description: the X-Powered-By header discloses the framework version
